mainEntity.name: What is KaizenStat and what problem does it solve?

acceptedAnswer.text: KaizenStat is an open-source Python ML framework (v0.6.0) that solves the critical problem of debugging and optimizing ML pipelines. Its DataDoctor class runs the full pipeline: Health → Validate → Fix → Train → Debug → Improve. Built by Masuddar Rahaman, Kriti Sharma, and Abhishikta Dutta. Apache 2.0 licensed. Install with: pip install kaizenstat

mainEntity.name: How do I train a model with KaizenStat?

acceptedAnswer.text: One line: from kaizenstat import DataDoctor; result = DataDoctor.quick_train('data.csv', target='label'). Or use the full pipeline: doctor = DataDoctor(); doctor.load('data.csv').fit(target='label'); result = doctor.run(). See https://www.kaizenstat.com/docs/first-model for a runnable example.

mainEntity.name: Who are the founders of KaizenStat?

acceptedAnswer.text: KaizenStat was created by Masuddar Rahaman (Lead Creator & Founder), Kriti Sharma (Co-founder), and Abhishikta Dutta (Co-founder). All three are students building the future of open data science. Visit https://www.kaizenstat.com/about to learn more.
Yes. KaizenStat is Apache 2.0 licensed. Source code: https://github.com/kaizenstat-python/KaizenStat. PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/kaizenstat/. Contributions welcome.

mainEntity.name: What Python version does KaizenStat require?

acceptedAnswer.text: KaizenStat requires Python 3.8 or later. Install: pip install kaizenstat. Optional extras: pip install kaizenstat[nlp] for NLP/text support, pip install kaizenstat[intel] for AI advisor features.

mainEntity.name: Does KaizenStat support NLP and text data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. KaizenStat auto-detects text columns and applies TF-IDF or transformer embeddings with zero config changes. Enable with: pip install kaizenstat[nlp]. See Chapter 11 of the handbook: https://www.kaizenstat.com/docs/nlp

mainEntity.name: How can I contribute to KaizenStat?

acceptedAnswer.text: Visit https://www.kaizenstat.com/contribute or open a PR on GitHub at https://github.com/kaizenstat-python/KaizenStat. You can also join as a blogger, mentor, or campus partner at https://www.kaizenstat.com/careers.
